results.title: Beyond the Protests-III: What the Crisis Means for Kashmir's Political Future
results.description: The unfolding crisis in Pakistan-administered Jammu and Kashmir has evolved from immediate grievances into a broad citizens’ movement exposing deep mistrust between the public and state institutions. With protests led by local committees rather than traditional parties, the government faces a complex negotiation landscape. Divided political responses, questions over election legitimacy, economic disruption and calls for a Truth and Reconciliation Commission underscore a pivotal test of governance, accountability and democratic stability in the region.

results.title: Will Rohit Sharma Retire From ODIs Today? Here's What We Know So Far
results.description: Will he or won't he? Here's all we know about Rohit Sharma's potential retirement announcement after the 3rd ODI between India and England at Lord's.

results.title: DMK backs women’s reservation on current Lok Sabha strength: MP Tiruchi Siva
results.description: The DMK on Sunday urged the government to come out with a clear formula on the Constitution amendment bill for providing 33 per cent reservation to women in Lok Sabha and state assemblies, asserting that the quota should be given on the current strength of the Lower House. The issue was raised by DMK leader [...]
